title: Effect Honey bottle
description: When you drink a honey bottle it gives you a effect of Haste II and Speed I [MC 1.21.X - 1.20.X]
body:
# Effect Honey Bottle
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/898f60f0f58234eb9c414c87d9df8227622d2ff5.png)
## Features
🍯 Effect Honey Bottle – Turn your honey into pure energy! Drink a bottle of honey and instantly gain Haste II and Speed I to boost your mining and movement speed. Simple, effective, and powerful!

## Compatibility
![Compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15e361006e127de3f16e6d55e3e5f9cdbb5eafe9.png)
